data.narrative:
Runway is a Series C AI & Software company founded by Cristóbal Valenzuela, Alejandro Matamala, and Anastasis Germanidis, currently valued at $1.5B post-money with $240M+ raised to date. The comparable universe comprises 9 private and 1 public company in the AI & Software sector, including peers such as Figure AI ($39.0B), Skild AI ($14.0B), Luma AI ($4.0B), and Magic AI ($1.5B).

Two valuation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis applied a 1.7x step-up multiplier to the $1.5B last post-money valuation, implying $2.5B. Peer-median analysis across four same-sector, same-stage comparables yielded a median valuation of $9.0B, with a range spanning $1.5B to $39.0B. The wide peer dispersion reflects heterogeneous market positioning and revenue maturity within frontier AI.

Triangulating these two methods produces a valuation range of $2.2B (low) to $10.3B (high), with a median of $5.8B. The current $1.5B valuation sits at the lower bound of peer precedent, suggesting either a discount to market or lower revenue traction relative to comparable stage peers. Key uncertainties include Runway's current revenue run-rate, user growth metrics, and competitive positioning within generative AI—factors that likely explain the wide dispersion among peer valuations.
